Navy distributed-production direction and capacity investment.

runs.text: Prime behavior:
HII public distributed-work commitments; GD supply-chain pressure signals.

text_body.plain_text: Prime behavior: HII public distributed-work commitments; GD supply-chain pressure signals.

runs.text: Demand signals support more external capacity, but not a larger sizing numerator.
Policy, oversight, and prime commentary point toward more distributed supplier work; the FY2022–FY2027 model still sizes from SCN Basic Construction and strict supplier coefficients.
DDG and submarine signals support the same direction for different reasons.
HII carries the clearer DDG distributed-production signal; GD's public signal is more submarine-centric, with margin pressure consistent with an outsourcing premium.

text_body.plain_text:
Demand signals support more external capacity, but not a larger sizing numerator.
Policy, oversight, and prime commentary point toward more distributed supplier work; the FY2022–FY2027 model still sizes from SCN Basic Construction and strict supplier coefficients.
DDG and submarine signals support the same direction for different reasons.
HII carries the clearer DDG distributed-production signal; GD's public signal is more submarine-centric, with margin pressure consistent with an outsourcing premium.

runs.text: The model sizes the current opportunity;
future distributed work for new entrants is a diligence question, not a modeled input.

text_body.plain_text: The model sizes the current opportunity; future distributed work for new entrants is a diligence question, not a modeled input.

runs.text: Sources: (1) Navy and OSD shipbuilding and industrial-base policy and budget materials, FY2021–FY2026; (2) GAO shipbuilding and submarine industrial-base reports; (3) HII and General Dynamics public disclosures and earnings commentary, 2024–2026

text_body.plain_text: Sources: (1) Navy and OSD shipbuilding and industrial-base policy and budget materials, FY2021–FY2026; (2) GAO shipbuilding and submarine industrial-base reports; (3) HII and General Dynamics public disclosures and earnings commentary, 2024–2026
